meaning: n.神话,神话式的人物(或事物),虚构的故事,荒诞的说法
examples: It's impossible to disentangle the myth from reality.
Comics tend to perpetuate the myth that 'boys don't cry'.
His exploration of the myth brings insight into the American psyche.
The Myth Of Stars 06.12.02 Movie stars are absolutely necessary to launch a hit picture.
In Scotland, summer is the second most famous myth after the Loch Ness Monster.
